inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled by the vehicle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance traveled by the vehicle.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption per 100 km (e.g., 8 L/100km for a mid-size car).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel consumption per 100 km (e.g., 8 L/100km for a mid-size car).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 100 km başına ortalama yakıt tüketimi (örneğin, orta boy bir araba için 8 L/100 km).

inputs.label: Fuel Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: CO₂ emissions per liter of fuel burned. For diesel ~2.68 kg/L, gasoline ~2.31 kg/L.

businessContext_i18n.en: CO₂ emissions per liter of fuel burned. For diesel ~2.68 kg/L, gasoline ~2.31 kg/L.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakılan litre başına CO₂ emisyonu. Dizel için ~2,68 kg/L, benzin için ~2,31 kg/L.

inputs.label: Number of Trips or Vehicles
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical trips or vehicles to scale total emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical trips or vehicles to scale total emissions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam emisyonları ölçeklendirmek için aynı sefer veya araç sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
